structural_coherence: The 'Credit Hours: 1 TO 23' line is duplicated under the 'Course Information' section.
Bullet points under 'Grading Policy' have an extra hyphen (e.g., '- -Weekly participation in meetings: 10%').

proposals.reasoning:
The 'Section...' line appears to be course metadata rather than a true section header, so it should be demoted to body text. There are no sections identified as institutional boilerplate. The '

Credit Hours:
1 TO 23' pattern targets and removes the duplicate 'Credit Hours' block. The '^- -' regex targets and replaces the extra hyphen at the beginning of bullet points, as noted in the issues.
